title: 'anaph #0599
definition:
1) to be angry, to be displeased, to breathe hard
    1a) (Qal) to be angry (of God)
    1b) (Hithpael) to be angry (always of God)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be angry, to be displeased, to breathe hard
    1a) (Qal) to be angry (of God)
    1b) (Hithpael) to be angry (always of God)

    NASB:  to be angry
